title: Special Nametags
description: Adds many new special names, like Jeb_ or Dinnerbone, to give to mobs!
body:
# Special NameTags V1.4 > Adds many **new special names**, like **Jeb_** or **Dinnerbone**, to **give** to **mobs**! **This presentation refers to the latest Data Pack release: Version 1.4.x.** For previous releases, check the "_Older Versions_" section at the bottom of the page. # 📥How to Install Choose if you want to download the pure **Data Pack** version or the **Mod** version and follow the steps accordingly.
Data Pack * **1)** Download the Data Pack * **2)** Chose the world you want to install the Data Pack in and navigate to its "_datapacks_" folder * **3)** Copy the downloaded Data Pack file (Special Nametags) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command
Mod * **1)** Download the Mod * **2)** Navigate to your mods folder (for the vanilla launcher the path is .minecraft/mods * **3)** Put the downloaded .jar file (Special Nametags) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command ### ⚠ Mod version is available starting from Minecraft 1.21 and up
# 📖Features This Data Pack adds **many new special names** to give to mobs! (_Like_ Dinnerbone _and_ Jeb_) ## How to use Simply **rename a mob** with one of the **names** in the **list below**, and the corresponding **effect will be applied**!
Special Names and Effects |**Special Name Tag**|**Effect**| |--|--| |Speedy Ghast**(NEW)**|Happy Ghast will have its flying speed increased by 3x (_+200%_)| |Lazy Ghast**(NEW)**|Happy Ghast flying speed will be restored to default| |freeze|Mob will no longer move and won't suffer any damage| |unfreeze|Mob will move normally and you'll be able to hit it again| |silent|Mob will no longer emit sounds| |noisy|Mob will emit sounds normally| |noname|Mob Custom Name will be removed| |nozombification|Piglin and hoglin will no longer zombificate in the Overworld| |zombification|Piglin and hoglin will be able to zombificate in the Overworld| |invulnerable|Mob will be invulnerable to any non-creative mode damage| |vulnerable|Mob will become vulnerable to any damage source| |gravityoff|Mob will no longer be affected by gravity| |gravityon|Mob will be affected by gravity| |onfire|Mob will visually be set on fire| |notonfire|Mob will no longer have visual fire| |baby|Mob will stay in baby form / Will became baby if is an adult already| |adult|Mob will grow up| |sit|Mob will sit on the ground| |unsit|Mob will stand up|
YouTube Showcase
# 📤How to Uninstall
Data Pack To uninstall the Data Pack run the command /function tags-nbt:uninstall. When the uninstallation process is completed a confirmation message will be sent in the chat.
Mod To uninstall the **Mod version** you need to run /function tags-nbt:uninstall command. Then you close the game and remove the **jar** file from your .minecraft/mods folder.
## 🔗External links ## 💾Older Versions
Version 1.3 to 1.3.2 (for Minecraft 1.21.4-1.21.8) # Special NameTags > Adds many **new special names**, like **Jeb_** or **Dinnerbone**, to **give** to **mobs**! **This presentation concerns about the latest release.** For older ones, check the "Older Versions" section, at the bottom of the page. # 📥How to Install Choose if you want to download the pure **Data Pack** version or the **Mod** version and follow the steps accordingly.
Data Pack * **1)** Download the Data Pack * **2)** Chose the world you want to install the Data Pack in and navigate to its "_datapacks_" folder * **3)** Copy the downloaded Data Pack file (Special Nametags) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command
Mod * **1)** Download the Mod * **2)** Navigate to your mods folder (for the vanilla launcher the path is .minecraft/mods * **3)** Put the downloaded .jar file (Special Nametags) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command ### ⚠ Mod version is available starting from Minecraft 1.21 and up
# 📖Features This Data Pack adds **many new special names** to give to mobs! (_Like_ Dinnerbone _and_ Jeb) ## How to use Simply **rename a mob** with one of the **name** in the **list below**, and the corresponding **effect will be applied**!
Special Names and Effects (1.21.4+) |**Special Name Tag**|**Effect**| |--|--| |freeze|Mob will no longer move and won't suffer any damage| |unfreeze|Mob will move normally and you'll be able to hit it again| |silent|Mob will no longer emit sounds| |noisy|Mob will emit sounds normally| |noname|Mob Custom Name will be removed| |nozombification|Piglin and hoglin will no longer zombificate in the Overworld| |zombification|Piglin and hoglin will be able to zombificate in the Overworld| |invulnerable|Mob will be invulnerable to any non-creative mode damage| |vulnerable|Mob will become vulnerable to any damage source| |gravityoff|Mob will no longer be affected by gravity| |gravityon|Mob will be affected by gravity| |onfire|Mob will visually be set on fire| |notonfire|Mob will no longer have visual fire| |baby|Mob will stay in baby form / Will became baby if is an adult already| |adult|Mob will grow up| |sit|Mob will sit on the ground| |unsit|Mob will stand up|
YouTube Showcase
# 📤How to Uninstall
Data Pack To uninstall the Data Pack run the command /function tags-nbt:uninstall. When the uninstallation process is completed a confirmation message will be sent in the chat.
Mod To uninstall the **Mod version** you need to run /function tags-nbt:uninstall command. Then you close the game and remove the **jar** file from your .minecraft/mods folder.
## 🔗External links
Version 1.3 and below (for Minecraft 1.18-1.21.3) # Special NameTags > Adds many Special Name Tags that allows more customization and control over mobs! # 📥How to Install Decide if you want to download the pure **Data Pack** version or the **Mod** version and follow the steps accordingly.
Data Pack * **1)** Download the Data Pack * **2)** Chose the world you want to install the Data Pack in and navigate to its "_datapacks_" folder * **3)** Copy the downloaded Data Pack file (Special Nametags) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command
Mod * **1)** Download the Mod * **2)** Navigate to your mods folder (for the vanilla launcher the path is .minecraft/mods * **3)** Put the downloaded .jar file (Special Nametags) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command ### ⚠ Mod version is available starting from Minecraft 1.21 and up
# 📖Features This Data Pack allows you to have more special names to give to mobs!
NameTags Effects 1.20.3-1.21.3 ### ⚠ IMPORTANT! Due to a bug fix made in 1.20.3, removing a mob's name has become almost impossible. This means that, when using a special name tag, the mob's name will no longer disapper as it did before. As a temporary workaround _(until MC-128225 is fixed)_ a new name tag has been added:noname.
NameTagEffect
noname (new)Mob custom name will be removed (new)
freezeMob will no longer move and you won't be able to hit it
unfreezeMob will move normally and you'll be able to hit it again
silentMob will no longer emit sounds
noisyMob will emit sound normally
nozombificationPiglin and hoglin will no longer zombificate in the Overworld
zombificationPiglin and hoglin will be able to zombificate in the Overworld
zombificationMob will be invulnerable to non creative damage
vulnerableMob will become vulnerable to any damage source
gravityoffMob will no longer be affected by gravity
gravityonMob will be affected by gravity
onfireMob will visually be set on fire
notonfireMob will no longer have visual fire
babyMob will stay in baby form / Will became baby if is an adult already
adultMob will grow up
sitMob will sit on the ground
unsitMob will stand up

# 📤How to Uninstall (1.20 +)
Data Pack To uninstall the Data Pack run the command /function tags-nbt:uninstall. When the uninstallation process is completed a confirmation message will be sent in the chat.
Mod To uninstall the **Mod version** you need to run /function tags-nbt:uninstall command. Then you close the game and remove the **jar** file from your .minecraft/mods folder.
